privileged_info_for_vlm: The script must be named 'generate_tactical_map.py' and output 'tactical_map.png'. The test scenario is located at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/m) Portsmouth Approach Custom/'. It contains exactly 3 vessels: 1 own ship ('MV Target' at Lat 50.79, Long -1.11) and 2 traffic vessels ('Incoming Tanker' and 'Crossing Ferry'). The generated image should show these 3 vessels as arrows indicating their heading with text labels on a Longitude (x) vs Latitude (y) plot. The script must dynamically parse the INI files and not hardcode these values, as it will be tested against a hidden validation scenario with 3 different vessels.
